creator: thoma555-bsd@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 185005
add "xlnx,zynq-7000" to zedboard and zybo compatible property.

CURRENT won't boot on Zedboard and Zybo without the attached tweaks to their DTS files.  I am working on changes that will allow Zynq boards to use upstream DTS files but it's not trivial and this will get things working again.
